trigger.description: Operator set `[search.lexical_ram_tier] request_hugepages = true` (or equivalent env var) on a host whose platform does not expose `MADV_HUGEPAGE` for file-backed mmaps. The loader continues with the regular page-size pinning fallback and surfaces this code so the operator knows the hugepage advice was silently dropped rather than honored.

expected_emission.repair_string: Move the workspace to a Linux host with transparent hugepages enabled, or set [search.lexical_ram_tier] request_hugepages = false; lexical RAM-tier pinning continues to work with regular page-size mappings.
